sub_modules.pe_compute: Combinational processing-element datapath that forwards west/north operands and computes the next accumulated result.
sub_modules.signed_mult32x32: Combinational signed 32-bit by 32-bit multiplier producing a 64-bit product.
sub_modules.cycle_done_logic: Combinational completion flag generator for the 9-cycle systolic computation window.
sub_modules.pe: Standalone reference processing element with the requested PE signature for compatibility.
